studentEligibility.enrolledHalfTime-you: Are you enrolled half-time or more in a university, college, or community college as defined by the educational institution?
studentEligibility.enrolledHalfTime-they: Are they enrolled half-time or more in a university, college, or community college as defined by the educational institution?
studentEligibility.jobTraining-you: Is the program that you are enrolled in a job training program?
studentEligibility.jobTraining-they: Is the program that they are enrolled in a job training program?
studentEligibility.workStudy-you: Do you have a federal or state work study program?
studentEligibility.workStudy-they: Do they have a federal or state work study program?
studentEligibility.works20Hours-you: Do you work 20 or more hours per week in other employment, including self-employment? (If the hours you work changes each week, do you work at least 80 hours in a month?)
studentEligibility.works20Hours-they: Do they work 20 or more hours per week in other employment, including self-employment? (If the hours they work changes each week, do they work at least 80 hours in a month?)
